612020.name: Path Resonance: Preservation
612020.desc: Spend 100 points of Energy to use this ability and resonate with the Path of Preservation, dealing Physical DMG to all enemies based on the total Shield between all allies.
612020.simple_desc: After using the Path Resonance, deals Physical DMG to all enemies based on the max DMG that can be absorbed by Shields on all allies.

612021.name: Resonance Formation: Zero-Dimensional Reinforcement
612021.desc: The attacks of Path Resonance: Preservation become CRIT Hits. For every Shielded character on the team, the CRIT DMG increases by 4%.
612021.simple_desc: The attacks of Path Resonance: Preservation are guaranteed to CRIT. The more characters there are with Shields, the higher the CRIT DMG.

612022.name: Resonance Formation: Eutectic Reaction
612022.desc: When Path Resonance is used, all allies gain a Shield that can absorb DMG equal to 8% of their respective Max HP, for 2 turns, and Amber is applied to all allies at the same time.
612022.simple_desc: Applies a Shield and Amber to all characters after using a Path Resonance.

612023.name: Resonance Formation: Isomorphous Reaction
612023.desc: When entering battle, Path Resonance regenerates 5% Energy. When an ally gains a Shield, Path Resonance additionally regenerates 6% Energy.
612023.simple_desc: When entering battle, Path Resonance regenerates Energy. When a character gains Shield, Path Resonance regenerates Energy.

612024.name: Resonance Interplay: Spiked Armor
612024.desc: There is a 150% base chance for Path Resonance: Preservation to inflict Bleed on the attacked target for 1 turn(s). Bleeding enemies will take Physical DoT equal to 2% of their Max HP at the start of each turn. This DMG cannot exceed 3% of the total amount of Shield Effect currently active on all allies.
612024.simple_desc: After using a Path Resonance, there is a high chance of applying Bleed to the enemy. DMG dealt is based on the total Shield on all allies.

612025.name: Resonance Interplay: Cold Snap
612025.desc: When attacking Frozen enemy targets with Path Resonance: Preservation, the DMG dealt increases by 1% and the Freeze status on the enemy targets is removed. Dissociation will not be removed by this effect.
612025.simple_desc: Increases DMG dealt by Path Resonance: Preservation to Frozen enemies and dispels their Freeze status.

612026.name: Resonance Interplay: Reverse Quenching
612026.desc: When using Path Resonance, extends Shield duration by 2 turn(s) on characters whose current HP is below 1% of their Max HP. For every character on which this takes effect, this current use of the Path Resonance deals 3% more DMG.
612026.simple_desc: Casting the Path Resonance extends Shield duration for allies whose HP percentage is below 1% and enables the next Path Resonance to deal more DMG.

612027.name: Resonance Interplay: Displaced Ascent
612027.desc: Using the Ultimate increases the next Path Resonance's Physical RES PEN by 1%, stacking up to 2 time(s).
612027.simple_desc: Using an Ultimate increases the next Path Resonance's Physical PEN.

612030.name: Divine Construct: Resonance Transfer
612030.desc: After a character launches an attack, deals Quake DMG equal to 1% of the character's current Shield to the hit enemies.
612030.simple_desc: After attacking enemies, the attacking character deals Quake DMG based on the current Shield Effect on the character.

612031.name: Divine Construct: Metastatic Field
612031.desc: After a character is attacked, deals Quake DMG to the attacker, equal to 1% of the character's current Shield Effect. This DMG cannot defeat the enemy.
612031.simple_desc: After a character is hit by an attack, deals Quake DMG based on the current Shield Effect on the attacked character.

612032.name: Divine Construct: Macrosegregation
612032.desc: At the start of the battle, characters gain a special Shield that can absorb DMG equal to 1% of their Max HP. Whenever another Shield is gained, this special Shield will also strengthen in equal value. For every 3 turn(s), this will be removed, and then this special Shield can be regained.
612032.simple_desc: When entering battle, characters gain a stackable special Shield. This Shield is reset every 3 turn(s).

612040.name: Interstellar Construct: Shear Structure
612040.desc: Characters deal 3% increased Quake DMG to their target enemy, and enemies adjacent to it also take Quake DMG equal to 1% of DMG dealt to the primary target enemy.
612040.simple_desc: Quake DMG increases and affects enemies adjacent to the target enemy.

612041.name: Interstellar Construct: Burst Lattice
612041.desc: When a character deals Quake DMG to an enemy target, there is a 1% base chance to cause the target to Bleed.
612041.simple_desc: Quake has a chance of applying Bleed on the enemy.

612042.name: Interstellar Construct: Solid Solution
612042.desc: Deals increased Quake DMG to enemies. The amount of DMG increased is equal to 1% of the character's current DEF.
612042.simple_desc: The DMG Quake deals increases with the character's DEF.

612043.name: Interstellar Construct: Safe Load
612043.desc: Shielded characters increase their ATK by 1% of the Shield Effect on them, up to a maximum of 2% of their Base ATK.
612043.simple_desc: Shielded characters increase their ATK based on the max DMG that can be absorbed by their current Shields.

612044.name: Interstellar Construct: Sanctuary
612044.desc: At the end of the turn, there is 1% fixed chance for characters to gain a Shield equal to 2% of their Max HP, lasting for 3 turn(s).
612044.simple_desc: Characters have a high chance of receiving a Shield at the end of the turn.

612045.name: Interstellar Construct: Quadrangular Pyramid
612045.desc: Increase the max DMG that can be absorbed by Shields created by characters by 1%.
612045.simple_desc: Increases the max DMG that can be absorbed by Shields created by characters.

612046.name: Interstellar Construct: Hypoeutectoid
612046.desc: When a character provides Shields to allies, this character gains a Shield that can absorb DMG equal to 1% of the provided Shield for 2 turn(s).
612046.simple_desc: Characters also receive a Shield when creating Shield(s) for allied targets.

612050.name: Construct: Assemble
612050.desc: Characters gain a 1% DEF increase for each Preservation Blessing, stacking up to a max of 2 time(s).
612050.simple_desc: The more Blessings of Preservation the team has, the higher the characters' DEF becomes.

612051.name: Construct: Sentinel
612051.desc: Upon entering battle, characters gain a Shield equal to 1% of their Max HP, lasting for 2 turn(s).
612051.simple_desc: When entering battle, all characters gain a Shield.

612052.name: Construct: Patch
612052.desc: After a character is attacked, they gain a Shield that can absorb DMG equal to 1% of the HP lost during this attack, lasting for 2 turn(s).
612052.simple_desc: After being hit, characters gain a Shield based on the HP lost in this attack.

612053.name: Construct: Compensation
612053.desc: After a character inflicts Weakness Break on an enemy, characters gain a Shield that can absorb DMG equal to 1% of their Max HP, lasting for 2 turn(s).
612053.simple_desc: When a character inflicts Weakness Break on a target, the character gains a Shield.

612055.name: Construct: Rotation
612055.desc: When a character gains a Shield, there is a 1% fixed chance to dispel 1 debuff that is currently placed on the character.
612055.simple_desc: When a character receives a shield, there is a small chance of removing a debuff currently on them.

612056.name: Construct: Burst
612056.desc: Increases the CRIT DMG of Shielded characters by 1%.
612056.simple_desc: Shielded Characters have increased CRIT DMG.

612057.name: Construct: Concentration
612057.desc: Increases the CRIT Rate of Shielded characters by 1%.
612057.simple_desc: Shielded Characters have increased CRIT Rate.

612120.name: Path Resonance: Remembrance
612120.desc: Spend 100 points of Energy to use this ability and resonate with the Path of Remembrance, dealing Ice DMG to all enemies with a 2% base chance to Freeze all enemies for 3 turn(s).
612120.simple_desc: After using Path Resonance, deals Ice DMG to all enemies with a high chance of Freezing them.

612121.name: Resonance Formation: Total Recall
612121.desc: When Path Resonance is used, there is a 150% base chance to decrease enemies' chance to resist Frozen by 100% for 4 turn(s).
612121.simple_desc: When using Path Resonance, there is a high chance of reducing all enemies' Freeze RES.

612122.name: Resonance Formation: Rich Experience
612122.desc: When using Path Resonance, there is a 150% base chance to apply Eonian River to all enemies for 1 turn.
612122.simple_desc: After using Path Resonance, there is a high chance to apply Eonian River to all enemies.

612123.name: Resonance Formation: First Love Once More
612123.desc: Upon battle entrance, Path Resonance regenerates 5% Energy. When an enemy becomes Frozen, Path Resonance additionally regenerates 6% Energy.
612123.simple_desc: When entering battle, Path Resonance regenerates Energy. When an enemy becomes Frozen, Path Resonance regenerates Energy.

612124.name: Resonance Interplay: Faces Places
612124.desc: When the Freeze effect caused by Path Resonance is dispelled or resisted by enemy targets, there is a 150% base chance of lowering the target's All-Type RES by 1% for 2 turn(s). For every 1% HP that each ally has lost, the target's All-Type RES is additionally lowered by 3%.
612124.simple_desc: When the Freeze effect of a Path Resonance is dispelled or resisted, reduces the enemy target(s)' All-Type RES based on the total lost HP percentage of all team members.

612125.name: Resonance Interplay: Landscape in the Mist
612125.desc: When the Freeze effect caused by Path Resonance is dispelled or resisted by enemy targets, there is a 150% base chance of decreasing the target's SPD by 1% for 2 turn(s).
612125.simple_desc: When the Freeze effect of a Path Resonance is dispelled or resisted, there is a high chance of reducing the enemy's SPD.

612126.name: Resonance Interplay: Roar and Rustle
612126.desc: When the Freeze effect from the Path Resonance is dispelled or resisted, characters gain a Shield equal in strength to 1% of their Max HP for 2 turn(s). This effect can only be triggered once by each use of the Path Resonance.
612126.simple_desc: Gains a Shield when the Freeze effect from the Path Resonance is dispelled or resisted.

612127.name: Resonance Interplay: Seemingly Mirrored
612127.desc: Basic ATKs against enemies Frozen by the Path Resonance have a 1% base chance to inflict Dissociation on them for 2 turn(s).
612127.simple_desc: Basic ATKs against enemies Frozen by the Path Resonance have a high chance to inflict Dissociation on them.

612130.name: Perfect Experience: Fuli
612130.desc: When attacking Frozen enemies, there is a 1% base chance to inflict Dissociation for 2 turn(s).
612130.simple_desc: After attacking a Frozen enemy, apply Dissociation on them.

612131.name: Perfect Experience: Innocence
612131.desc: After a character inflicts Weakness Break on an enemy, there is a 1% base chance to apply Dissociation on the enemy for 2 turn(s).
612131.simple_desc: After a character inflicts Weakness Break on an enemy, apply Dissociation on them.

612132.name: Perfect Experience: Reticence
612132.desc: After an enemy is attacked 1 time(s), they have a 2% base chance to become Frozen for 3 turn(s).
612132.simple_desc: The enemy has a high chance to become Frozen for every 1 attack(s) it receives.

612140.name: Ultimate Experience: Melancholia
612140.desc: Attacking an enemy with Dissociation will remove Dissociation, and deal DMG equal to 1% of the Dissociation removal DMG.
612140.simple_desc: When a character attacks an enemy with Dissociation, remove Dissociation from the enemy and increase the DMG received when this status is removed.

612141.name: Ultimate Experience: Dizziness
612141.desc: Increases the DMG taken by enemies with Dissociation by 1%. This effect will remain for 1 turn after Dissociation is removed.
612141.simple_desc: Enemies with Dissociation take increased DMG.

612142.name: Ultimate Experience: Insensitivity
612142.desc: After Dissociation is removed from an enemy, there is a 1% base chance to Freeze the enemy for 2 turn(s).
612142.simple_desc: When Dissociation is removed from an enemy, there is a chance for them to become Frozen.

612143.name: Ultimate Experience: Sentimentality
612143.desc: After an enemy receives Ice DMG, enemies adjacent to it also receive DMG equal to 1% of the DMG taken by the target enemy.
612143.simple_desc: Ice DMG taken by enemies can affect enemies adjacent to the target enemy.

612144.name: Ultimate Experience: Indelibility
612144.desc: When a character deals DMG to an enemy, there's a 1% base chance to Freeze the hit enemy for 2 turn(s).
612144.simple_desc: When characters deal DMG to enemies, there is a small chance to Freeze the enemy.

612145.name: Ultimate Experience: Shudder
612145.desc: After a character uses their Ultimate, there is a 1% base chance to apply Ice Weakness to a random enemy for 2 turn(s).
612145.simple_desc: After a character uses their Ultimate, a random enemy gains Ice Weakness.

612146.name: Ultimate Experience: Maverick
612146.desc: Upon entering battle, there is a 1% base chance for all enemies to become Frozen for 2 turn(s).
612146.simple_desc: Upon entering battle, there is a high chance of inflicting Freeze on all enemies.

612150.name: Experience: Unspeakable Shame
612150.desc: For every Blessing of Remembrance the team has, enemies' chance to resist Frozen decreases by 1%, stacking up to 2 time(s).
612150.simple_desc: The more Blessings of Remembrance the team has, the lower the enemy targets' Freeze RES become.

612151.name: Experience: The Torment of Alienation
612151.desc: Characters' Effect Hit Rate increases by 1%.

612152.name: Experience: Lost Memory
612152.desc: When attacks reduce an enemy's HP percentage to a point that is lower than 1% for the first time in this battle, there's a 2% base chance to Freeze the enemy for 3 turn(s).
612152.simple_desc: Enemies have a chance of becoming Frozen when they fall to low health from characters' attacks.

612153.name: Experience: Stone Cold Hatred
612153.desc: When a character uses their Skill or Ultimate to attack a Frozen enemy, DMG for this attack increases by 1%.
612153.simple_desc: Characters' Skill and Ultimate deal increased DMG against Frozen enemies.

612154.name: Experience: Pain & Suffering
612154.desc: Right after an enemy is Frozen, the next 1 attack(s) launched against the said enemy will have 100% increased CRIT Rate. This effect is dispelled when the Frozen state is removed.
612154.simple_desc: After an enemy is Frozen, the next 1 attack(s) they receive are guaranteed to CRIT.

612155.name: Experience: Primordial Hardship
612155.desc: Increases the DMG taken by Frozen enemies by 1%.
612155.simple_desc: DMG taken by Frozen enemies increases.

612156.name: Experience: Thrill of Escalation
612156.desc: When a character Freezes an enemy, regenerates 1 Energy. This effect may only trigger once per action.
612156.simple_desc: Characters regenerate Energy when they apply Freeze on enemies.

612157.name: Experience: Responsive Excitement
612157.desc: When a character applies Freeze to an enemy, the character gains a Shield that can absorb DMG equal to 1% of their Max HP for 2 turn(s).
612157.simple_desc: Characters gain a Shield when they apply Freeze on enemies.

612220.name: Path Resonance: Nihility
612220.desc: Spend 100 points of Energy to use this ability and resonate with the Path of Nihility, with a 1% base chance to apply Burn, Shock, Bleed, and 2 stacks of Wind Shear on all enemies for 4 turn(s).
612220.simple_desc: After using a Path Resonance, there is a high chance of applying Burn, Shock, Bleed, and Wind Shear on all enemies.

612221.name: Resonance Formation: The Doubtful Fourfold Root
612221.desc: When using Path Resonance, increases the base chance of applying statuses by 100% and the duration of statuses by 1 turn, and adds 1 stack to all stackable statuses.
612221.simple_desc: When using the Path Resonance, increases the base chance of inflicting status effects, extends the duration of these status effects, and adds to their stacks.

612222.name: Resonance Formation: Suffering and Sunshine
612222.desc: The attacks of Path Resonance: Nihility have a 100% base chance to inflict 2 stacks of Confusion and 2 stacks of Devoid on all enemies for 5 turn(s).
612222.simple_desc: The attacks of Path Resonance: Nihility have a high chance to apply Confusion and Devoid.

612223.name: Resonance Formation: Outsider
612223.desc: When entering battle, Path Resonance regenerates 8% Energy. When an enemy receives DoT, Path Resonance additionally regenerates 9% Energy.
612223.simple_desc: When entering battle, Path Resonance regenerates Energy. When an enemy receives DoT, Path Resonance regenerates Energy.

612224.name: Resonance Interplay: Off the Beaten Track
612224.desc: After using a Path Resonance, for every type of debuff (out of Burn, Shock, Bleed, and Wind Shear) the enemy target is currently inflicted with, Advance Forward all allies' actions by 1%.
612224.simple_desc: After using a Path Resonance, for every type of debuff (out of Burn, Shock, Bleed, and Wind Shear) the enemy target is currently inflicted with, Advance Forward all allies' actions.

612225.name: Resonance Interplay: White Nights
612225.desc: A character's Basic ATK can cause all DoTs currently applied on the target via Path Resonance: Nihility to immediately deal DMG equivalent to 1% of these statuses' original DMG.
612225.simple_desc: Basic ATK can additionally trigger the DoT of Path Resonance: Nihility.

612226.name: Resonance Interplay: Reign of Keys
612226.desc: Path Resonance deals 1% more DMG to Frozen enemies. When enemy targets become Frozen, DoTs applied by the Path Resonance extend their duration by 2 turn(s).
612226.simple_desc: The DoT effects from the Path Resonance deal more DMG to Frozen enemies and have their duration extended.

612227.name: Resonance Interplay: Terror and Tremble
612227.desc: For each unique Type of non-DoT DMG the enemy target has taken, Path Resonance deals 1% more DMG to it, lasting until the end of the turn.
612227.simple_desc: Path Resonance deals more DMG for each unique type of non-DoT DMG the target has taken.

612230.name: Funeral of Sensory Pursuivant
612230.desc: Every time an enemy takes DMG from a DoT, applies 1 stack(s) of Suspicion.
612230.simple_desc: Every time an enemy takes DMG from a DoT, apply 1 stack(s) of Suspicion on them.

612231.name: The Man in the Cover
612231.desc: Every time an enemy is afflicted with a DoT, apply 1 stack(s) of Suspicion.
612231.simple_desc: Every time an enemy is afflicted with a DoT state, apply 1 stack(s) of Suspicion on them.

612232.name: Why Hasn't Everything Already Disappeared?
612232.desc: At the beginning of an enemy's turn, trigger extra DoT 1 times, dealing DMG equal to 2% of the original DoT.
612232.simple_desc: At the start of an enemy's turn, all DoT sources on it are triggered 1 extra time(s).

612240.name: Beginning and End
612240.desc: When an enemy inflicted with Suspicion is defeated, inflicts the same number of stacks of Suspicion the defeated enemy has on 1 random enemy target(s).
612240.simple_desc: When an enemy afflicted with Suspicion is defeated, transfers the defeated enemy's Suspicion stacks to 1 random enemy target(s).

612241.name: Café Self-Deceit
612241.desc: When an enemy has Suspicion on them, inflicts 1 extra stack(s) of Suspicion.
612241.simple_desc: When an enemy becomes afflicted with Suspicion, apply 1 extra stack(s) of Suspicion on them.

612242.name: Call of the Wilderness
612242.desc: For every stack of Suspicion the enemies have, reduces their ATK by 1%, up to a max of 2%.
612242.simple_desc: Decreases the target enemy's ATK based on the total stacks of Suspicion on the enemy team.

612243.name: Night Beyond Pyre
612243.desc: Increases characters' Weakness Break Efficiency by 1%.

612244.name: Hell is Other People
612244.desc: When a character inflicts Weakness Break on an enemy, the same type of Weakness Break effect is applied to enemies adjacent to it.
612244.simple_desc: When a character Breaks an enemy's Weakness, enemies adjacent to it will also have their Weaknesses Broken.

612245.name: Twilight of Existence
612245.desc: When hitting a Weakness Broken enemy, there is a 1% base chance to apply Burn, Shock, Bleed, or Wind Shear on the enemy for 2 turn(s).
612245.simple_desc: If an enemy's Weakness is Broken after receiving an attack, there is a chance for them to be inflicted with a random DoT.

612246.name: All Things are Possible
612246.desc: If an enemy is attacked while under any DoT statuses, a random DoT will be triggered, dealing DMG equal to 1% of the DoT.
612246.simple_desc: If an enemy is under any DoT status when receiving an attack, they will take DMG from a random DoT on them.

612250.name: Ignosticism
612250.desc: Gains a 1% DoT increase for each Nihility Blessing. This effect can stack up to a max of 2 time(s).
612250.simple_desc: The more Blessings of Nihility the team has, the higher the characters' DoT becomes.

612253.name: Tragic Lecture
612253.desc: Increases DoT taken by enemies by 1%.
612253.simple_desc: Enemies take increased DMG from DoTs.

612254.name: Sensory Labyrinth
612254.desc: Extends the duration of Wind Shear, Bleed, Shock, and Burn on enemies by 1 turn(s).
612254.simple_desc: Extends the duration of Wind Shear, Bleed, Shock, and Burn on enemies by 1 turn(s).

612255.name: Emotional Decluttering
612255.desc: Every time an enemy target is afflicted with a DoT status, the DMG taken by them increases by 1%. This effect can stack up to 2 time(s).
612255.simple_desc: The more DoTs the enemy has, the more DMG they will receive from all sources.

612256.name: Offerings of Deception
612256.desc: Every time an enemy takes DMG from a DoT, all allies restore HP equal to 1% of their respective Max HP.
612256.simple_desc: Every time an enemy takes DMG from a DoT, all characters restore HP.

612257.name: Before Sunrise
612257.desc: Every time an enemy receives a DoT, 1 Energy is regenerated for a random ally.
612257.simple_desc: Every time an enemy takes DMG from a DoT, a random ally regenerates Energy.

612320.name: Path Resonance: Abundance
612320.desc: Spend 100 points of Energy to use this ability and resonate with the Path of Abundance, restore HP for all allies by 1% of their respective Max HP, and increases their respective Max HP by 2% for 3 turn(s).
612320.simple_desc: After using Path Resonance, restores all allies' HP and increases their respective Max HP.

612321.name: Resonance Formation: Terminal Nirvana
612321.desc: When any ally receives lethal DMG, the Resonance of Path of Abundance prevents them from being knocked down and automatically consumes all Energy to release Path Resonance. This effect can trigger up to 9 time(s) per battle.
612321.simple_desc: When characters receive lethal DMG, they will not be knocked down and will automatically activate Path Resonance (consuming all Energy) instead. This effect can be triggered a limited amount of times per battle.

612322.name: Resonance Formation: Anicca
612322.desc: After releasing a Path Resonance, removes all characters' debuffs and applies 4 stack(s) of Subduing Evils for 5 turn(s).
612322.simple_desc: After using the Path Resonance, remove debuffs from all characters and apply Subduing Evils.

612323.name: Resonance Formation: Anatta
612323.desc: After Path Resonance Energy is consumed for the first time in battle for the use of Path Resonance, the Path Resonance for Abundance will appear in the Action Order. The Outgoing Healing provided by this Resonance decreases by 8%. When this Resonance takes action, it will automatically release Path Resonance 1 time to heal allies.
612323.simple_desc: After using Path Resonance for the first time in a battle, Path Resonance: Abundance will appear in the Action Order.

612324.name: Resonance Interplay: Mountain High
612324.desc: After a character has their HP restored via Path Resonance and if the healing amount exceeds the maximum HP, recover 1 Skill Point. This effect can only trigger 1 time per Path Resonance use. After triggering this effect, all DMG dealt by all allies is increased by 1% for 2 turns. This effect can stack up to 3 time(s).
612324.simple_desc: When a Path Resonance overheals, recovers 1 Skill Point and increases all allies' DMG.

612325.name: Resonance Interplay: Nullifying Ardor
612325.desc: After using Path Resonance, all allies' Weakness Break Efficiency increases by 1% and Break Effect increases by 2%. This effect lasts for 3 turn(s) and stacks up to 4 time(s).
612325.simple_desc: After using a Path Resonance, increases all allies' Weakness Break Efficiency and Break Effect.

612326.name: Resonance Interplay: Fleeting Samadhi
612326.desc: For every 1% of healing from Path Resonance that exceeds a character's Max HP, the character deals 1% increased Ultimate DMG. This effect is stackable, up to a maximum of 2%, lasting for 3 turn(s).
612326.simple_desc: Exceeding healing from Path Resonance increases Ultimate DMG dealt by characters.

612327.name: Resonance Interplay: Destined Death
612327.desc: Healing from Path Resonance that exceeds a character's Max HP is stored and will be released as automatic healing when the character's HP falls below 1% of their Max HP. Up to 2% of the character's Max HP (when the Path Resonance is used) can be stored.
612327.simple_desc: Exceeded healing from the Path Resonance is stored and will be released when the character's HP percentage falls below 1%.

612330.name: Perennial Prosperity, Lush Longevity
612330.desc: Charges Dewdrop when a character receives healing. The Charge value is equal to 1% of the amount of HP restored.
612330.simple_desc: When a character's HP is restored, "Dewdrop" is Charged according to the amount of healing received.

612331.name: Mudra of Blessing
612331.desc: Charges "Dewdrop" at the beginning of a character's turn. The Charge value is equal to 1% of their current HP.
612331.simple_desc: When a character's turn begins, "Dewdrop" is Charged based on the character's current HP.

612332.name: All Abundance in One Mind
612332.desc: When a character provides healing, ally targets other than the healed target will also gain HP equal to 1% of the HP restored.
612332.simple_desc: Healing effects provided by characters can be Blasted to all allies.

612340.name: Sin Dead, Grace Born
612340.desc: Restores HP to the character equal to 1% of the Charge value when "Dewdrop" ruptures, up to 2% of the character's Max HP.
612340.simple_desc: Restores the character's HP when "Dewdrop" breaks.

612341.name: The Blessed Many
612341.desc: When a character's HP is full, increases the Charging Efficiency for "Dewdrop" by 1%.
612341.simple_desc: When a character's HP is full, "Dewdrop's" Charging Efficiency increases.

612342.name: Salvation From Damnation
612342.desc: When a "Dewdrop" breaks, there is a 1% fixed chance to remove 1 debuff on the character.
612342.simple_desc: There is a chance of removing 1 debuff when "Dewdrop" breaks.

612343.name: Candlelight Radiance
612343.desc: When a character provides healing to allies, increases the ATK of both units by 1% for 2 turn(s).
612343.simple_desc: When a character restores an ally's HP, both units' ATK increases.

612344.name: Bitter Is the Bane
612344.desc: After launching attacks, characters deal Additional DMG equal to 1% of their current HP.
612344.simple_desc: After a character uses an attack, they deal Additional DMG based on their current HP.

612345.name: Corporeal Pellucidity
612345.desc: When a character's HP is full, reduces their DMG taken by 1%.
612345.simple_desc: When a character's HP is full, their DMG received is reduced.

612346.name: Prajna Voyage
612346.desc: When being healed by an ally target, characters restore extra HP equal to 1% of the amount of HP restored.
612346.simple_desc: Characters that have their HP restored by an ally also restore extra HP.

612350.name: Dharma Rain
612350.desc: For each Abundance Blessing, increase allies' respective Max HP by 1%. This effect can stack up to a max of 2 time(s).
612350.simple_desc: The more Blessings of Abundance the team has, the higher the characters' Max HP becomes.

612351.name: Dew Delight
612351.simple_desc: Increases the amount of HP restored by characters.

612352.name: Extended Life
612352.desc: Upon entering battle, characters restore HP equal to 1% of their Max HP.
612352.simple_desc: When entering battle, all characters restore HP.

612353.name: Mudra
612353.desc: After a character inflicts Weakness Break on an enemy, restores HP to the character equal to 1% of their Max HP.
612353.simple_desc: Characters restore HP after inflicting Weakness Break on enemies.

612354.name: Peril Parry
612354.desc: After a character is healed, increases their DEF by 1% for 2 turn(s).
612354.simple_desc: After having their HP restored, the character's DEF increases.

612355.name: Back to Life
612355.desc: After a character provides healing, they restore HP equal to 1% of their Max HP. This effect can only trigger once per action.
612355.simple_desc: After restoring an ally's HP, the healer character also restores HP.

612356.name: Force Victoire
612356.desc: After a character is healed, increases their SPD by 1% for 2 turn(s).
612356.simple_desc: After having their HP restored, the character's SPD increases.

612357.name: Empower
612357.desc: After a character provides healing, there is a 1% fixed chance to recover 1 Skill Point. This effect can only trigger once per action.
612357.simple_desc: After restoring an ally's HP, there is a small chance of recovering a Skill Point.

612420.name: Path Resonance: The Hunt
612420.desc: Spend 100 points of Energy to use this ability and resonate with the Path of The Hunt, dealing Wind DMG to all enemies based on the current ATK of the character currently with the highest ATK.
612420.simple_desc: After using the Path Resonance, deals Wind DMG to all enemy units based on the ATK of the character with the highest ATK on the team.

612421.name: Resonance Formation: Star Hunter
612421.desc: When using Path Resonance, the ally with the highest ATK will be given a turn instantly and be granted Light-Hunting Celestial Arrow, lasting until this ally uses any ability.
612421.simple_desc: When using the Path Resonance, the character with the highest ATK will instantly act and become Light-Hunting Celestial Arrow.

612422.name: Resonance Formation: Bow and Arrow
612422.desc: When Path Resonance: The Hunt deals damage, enemies whose HP is lower than 3% are guaranteed to receive CRIT Hits, with the CRIT DMG at 5%. When the enemy is defeated, regenerates 6% Energy.
612422.simple_desc: Attacks from Path Resonance: The Hunt are guaranteed to CRIT against enemies with HP lower than 3%. Path Resonance: The Hunt regenerates energy if it defeats an enemy.

612423.name: Resonance Formation: Perfect Aim
612423.desc: Increase the Energy limit of Path Resonance from 100 to 200 points. When an ally's turn starts, additionally regenerates 7% Energy for Path Resonance.
612423.simple_desc: Doubles the Energy limit of Path Resonance. Path Resonance regenerates Energy at the start of every character's turn.

612424.name: Resonance Interplay: Startling Breeze
612424.desc: After using Path Resonance, all allies' SPD increases by 1 for 2 turn(s). This effect also applies to units summoned by allies.
612424.simple_desc: After using a Path Resonance, increases all allies' SPD. This effect also applies to units summoned by allies.

612425.name: Resonance Interplay: Shooting Starfire
612425.desc: After enemy target(s) are defeated by a Path Resonance, restores all allies' HP equal to 1% of their respective Max HP.
612425.simple_desc: After a Path Resonance defeats an enemy, restores all allies' HP.

612426.name: Resonance Interplay: Solemn Snare
612426.desc: For every Skill Point recovered by allies, the next Path Resonance deals 1% more DMG, stacking up to 2 time(s).
612426.simple_desc: Gaining Skill Points increases the DMG for Path Resonance's attack.

612427.name: Resonance Interplay: Waiting with Drawn Bow
612427.desc: When using Path Resonance, allies' Shield duration extends by 1 turn(s).
612427.simple_desc: When using Path Resonance, extends characters' Shield duration.

612430.name: Empyrean Imperium
612430.desc: When a character's turn begins, they gain 3 stack(s) of Critical Boost.
612430.simple_desc: When a character's turn begins, they gain 3 stack(s) of Critical Boost.

612431.name: Radiant Supreme
612431.desc: After a character defeats an enemy, their action is Advanced Forward by 100%. At the beginning of the next turn, they gain 3 stack(s) of Critical Boost.
612431.simple_desc: After defeating an enemy, the character's action is Advanced Forward by 100%. At the beginning of the next turn, they gain 3 stack(s) of Critical Boost.

612432.name: Sovereign Skybreaker
612432.desc: After a character inflicts Weakness Break on an enemy, their action Advances Forward by 100% and increases the DMG dealt by their next attack by 1%.
612432.simple_desc: After a character inflicts Weakness Break on an enemy, their action Advances Forward by 100% and increases the DMG dealt by their next attack.

612440.name: Skyward Vendetta
612440.desc: If a character has higher than 100% CRIT Rate and currently has "Critical Boost," for every 1% CRIT Rate that exceeds 100%, CRIT DMG increases by 1%. CRIT DMG can be increased this way by a max of 2%.
612440.simple_desc: When a character has Critical Boost, their excess CRIT Rate turns into CRIT DMG.

612441.name: Archery Duel
612441.desc: When a character's turn begins, every stack of Critical Boost restores the character's HP equal to 1% of their Max HP.
612441.simple_desc: When a character's turn begins, their HP is restored based on the number of Critical Boost stacks they have.

612442.name: Adept's Bow
612442.desc: When any ally uses their Ultimate, they can inherit Critical Boost, and the number of Critical Boost stacks increases by 1.
612442.simple_desc: Ultimates can inherit and increase Critical Boost stacks.

612443.name: Mistwraith Pursuit
612443.desc: When the same character acts consecutively, their ATK increases by 1%. This effect can stack up to 2 time(s).
612443.simple_desc: When the same character acts consecutively, their ATK increases.

612444.name: Starlit Hunt
612444.desc: When a character defeats an enemy, regenerates Energy equal to 1% of the character's Max Energy.
612444.simple_desc: After a character defeats an enemy, they regenerate a massive amount of Energy.

612445.name: Borisin Chase
612445.desc: After every 1 turn(s) conducted by all allies, the current character's action is Advanced Forward by 100%. The effect cannot be triggered repeatedly by the same character.
612445.simple_desc: Every time a certain number of turns had passed, the current character's action is Advanced Forward by 100%.

612446.name: Rainbow Fang
612446.desc: When a character defeats an enemy, restores their HP equal to 1% of their Max HP.
612446.simple_desc: After a character defeats a target enemy, restore the character's HP.

612450.name: Vermeil Bow and White Arrow
612450.desc: For every Blessing from The Hunt, increases SPD by 1%. This effect can stack up to a max of 2 time(s).
612450.simple_desc: The more Blessings of The Hunt the team has, the higher the characters' SPD becomes.

612453.name: Thundering Chariot
612453.desc: After a character inflicts Weakness Break on an enemy, delays the enemy's action by 1%.
612453.simple_desc: After a character inflicts Weakness Break on an enemy, the enemy's action is delayed.

612454.name: Constellation Surge
612454.desc: Upon entering battle, characters' SPD increases by 1% until they are attacked.
612454.simple_desc: Upon entering battle, characters' SPD is increased until they are attacked.

612455.name: Astral Menace
612455.desc: At the end of a character's turn, their next action is Advanced Forward by 1%.
612455.simple_desc: When a character's turn ends, their action is Advanced Forward.

612456.name: Arboreal Volley
612456.desc: At the beginning of a character's turn, they regenerate 1 Energy.
612456.simple_desc: When a character's turn begins, regenerate their Energy.

612457.name: Arrow Shades Bow
612457.desc: At the beginning of a character's turn, receives an ATK boost equal to 1% of the last-acting ally's ATK. This will last until the next turn starts.
612457.simple_desc: When a character's turn begins after an ally has completed their turn, increase ATK based on the previous ally who had acted.

612520.name: Path Resonance: Destruction
612520.desc: Spend 100 points of Energy to use this ability and resonate with the Path of Destruction, dealing Fire DMG to all enemies based on the current HP difference between Max HP and current HP for all allies combined.
612520.simple_desc: After using the Path Resonance, deals Fire DMG to all enemies based on the HP difference between all allies' Max HP and their current HP.

612521.name: Resonance Formation: Cataclysmic Variable
612521.desc: Using a Path Resonance will consume HP from all allies until their HP is equal to 3% of their respective Max HP, increasing the DMG of Path Resonance: Destruction by 4%. The amount of HP consumed will be converted into a Shield lasting for 5 turn(s), with the same Shield value as the HP lost.
612521.simple_desc: After using the Path Resonance, consume characters' HP and turn the value into Shields. The DMG of Path Resonance: Destruction increases.

612522.name: Resonance Formation: Extreme Helium Flash
612522.desc: The attacks of Path Resonance: Destruction have a 150% base chance to inflict Entropic Retribution on the enemy target for 6 turn(s).
612522.simple_desc: The attacks of Path Resonance: Destruction have a high chance to apply Entropic Retribution on enemies.

612523.name: Resonance Formation: Event Horizon
612523.desc: When an ally whose current HP percentage is below 9% gets attacked, automatically releases 1 Path Resonance without consuming Energy. This effect can be triggered up to a max of 10 time(s) in a single battle and cannot be triggered multiple times by the same attack.
612523.simple_desc: When a character is hit and their HP is lower than 9% of their Max HP, Path Resonance will be used 1 time at no cost.

612524.name: Resonance Interplay: Substellar Belt
612524.desc: Using Path Resonance will cause any character with current HP percentage lower than 1% to gain a Shield equal to 2% of their Max HP, lasting for 3 turn(s).
612524.simple_desc: After using a Path Resonance, grants a Shield to a character with current HP percentage lower than 1%.

612525.name: Resonance Interplay: Zero Age Main Sequence
612525.desc: When a character launches a Follow-Up ATK, regenerates 1% Energy for Path Resonance. If the character's current HP percentage is lower than 2%, additionally regenerates 3% Energy for Path Resonance.
612525.simple_desc: When a character launches a Follow-Up ATK, Path Resonance regenerates Energy. If the character's HP percentage is lower than 2%, increases the amount of Energy regenerated.

612526.name: Resonance Interplay: Nuclear Implosion
612526.desc: When using Path Resonance to attack, additionally deals a set amount of DMG to all enemy targets whose HP is below 1% of their Max HP, reducing these targets' HP to 1.
612526.simple_desc: When using Path Resonance to attack, if an enemy's HP percentage is lower than 1% of their Max HP, their remaining HP is reduced to 1.

612527.name: Resonance Interplay: Protostar
612527.desc: After losing HP due to allies or Path Resonance effects, the characters gain Healing Over Time that lasts 1 turn(s). At the start of every turn, restore HP equal to 2% of the consumed HP.
612527.simple_desc: When characters lose HP due to allies or Path Resonance effects, they restore HP over time.

612530.name: Non-Inverse Antimatter Equation
612530.desc: If a character's current HP percentage is below 6%, they are considered to have 5 extra stacks of Grit.
612530.simple_desc: If a character's current HP is below 6%, they are considered to have extra stacks of Grit.

612531.name: Universal Heat Death Characteristic
612531.desc: When characters are hit or are losing HP, they gain 6 stack(s) of Grit. When the turn ends, the character loses 5 stack(s) of Grit.
612531.simple_desc: When a character is hit or have their HP lowered, they gain 6 stack(s) of Grit.

612532.name: Regression Inequality of Annihilation
612532.desc: When player characters are hit, DMG taken by the characters is distributed among all allies.

612540.name: Incremental Doomsday
612540.desc: After being hit, for each stack of Grit the character has, the character deals Additional DMG equal to 1% of their ATK to the attacker. This DMG will not be able to defeat the enemy.
612540.simple_desc: After a character is hit, deal Additional DMG to the attacker based on their Grit stack.

612541.name: Catastrophic Resonance
612541.desc: If a character attacks while having Grit, consumes HP equal to 1% of current HP and deals Additional DMG equal to 2% of the HP lost.
612541.simple_desc: After a character attacks, consume their own HP to deal Additional DMG based on the HP difference between the character's Max HP and current HP.

612542.name: Indicative Depth of Field
612542.desc: For each stack of Grit, reduces the DMG taken by the character by 1%.
612542.simple_desc: The higher the Grit stacks are, the less DMG the character takes.

612543.name: Devastating Accretion
612543.desc: For every 1% of the difference between a character's Max HP and current HP, their ATK increases by 1%.
612543.simple_desc: The lower a character's current HP is, the higher their ATK becomes.

612544.name: Destructive Flare
612544.desc: When a character's HP percentage is lower than 1%, deals 2% increased DMG.
612544.simple_desc: When a character's HP percentage is lower than 1%, they deal increased DMG.

612545.name: Disciplinary Flicker
612545.desc: If an ally target's current HP percentage is lower than 1% after being attacked or consuming HP, restores their HP by 2% of their Max HP. This can restore HP equal to a maximum of 3% Max HP during a single action.
612545.simple_desc: When a character is hit or have their HP lowered, their HP is restored if their current HP percentage is lower than 1%.

612546.name: Hazardous Lucent Residue
612546.desc: After a character uses their Ultimate, they gain a Shield that can absorb DMG equal to 1% of the HP difference between their Max HP and current HP, lasting for 2 turn(s).
612546.simple_desc: After using their Ultimate, characters gain a Shield based on the HP difference between their Max HP and current HP.

612550.name: Primordial Black Hole
612550.desc: Characters gain a 1% ATK increase for each Destruction Blessing. This effect can stack up to a max of 2 time(s).
612550.simple_desc: The more Blessings of Destruction the team has, the higher the characters' ATK becomes.

612551.name: Reflection
612551.desc: When struck with a killing blow, instead of becoming downed, characters immediately restore HP by 1% of their Max HP. The allied team can only trigger this effect 2 time(s) per battle.
612551.simple_desc: Characters can resist fatal attacks and restore their own HP. This can take effect a limited number of times among all allies.

612553.name: Instability Strip
612553.desc: When characters are hit or have lost HP, 1 Energy is regenerated.
612553.simple_desc: When characters are hit or are losing HP, their Energy is regenerated.

612554.name: Metric Reservation
612554.desc: Upon entering battle, characters gain a Shield that can absorb DMG equal to 1% the HP difference between the character's Max HP and current HP, lasting for 2 turn(s).
612554.simple_desc: Upon entering battle, characters gain a Shield based on the HP difference between the character's Max HP and current HP.

612555.name: Sentinel Satellite
612555.desc: When a character's HP percentage is lower than 1%, they gain a Shield that can absorb DMG equal to 2% of their Max HP for 3 turn(s). This effect can only be triggered 4 time(s) by each character per battle.
612555.simple_desc: When a character's current HP percentage is lower than 1%, they receive a Shield. This buff can only be triggered a limited number of times.

612556.name: Polarization Receptor
612556.desc: For every 1% of HP lost by a character, their DEF increases by 1%.
612556.simple_desc: The lower a character's current HP is, the higher their DEF becomes.

612557.name: Eternally Collapsing Object
612557.desc: For every 1% of HP lost by a character, their Effect RES increases by 1%.
612557.simple_desc: The lower a character's current HP is, the higher their Effect RES becomes.

612620.name: Path Resonance: Elation
612620.desc: Can consume 100 points of Energy to use the ability and resonate with the Path of Elation, dealing Follow-Up ATK DMG of a random Type to all enemies for 2 – 3 time(s).
612620.simple_desc: After using Path Resonance, deals Follow-Up ATK DMG of a random Type to all enemies for a random number of times.

612621.name: Resonance Formation: Doomsday Carnival
612621.desc: When Path Resonance: Elation deals DMG, there is a 150% base chance to apply Sensory Pursuit to enemies for 1 turn.
612621.simple_desc: Every time Path Resonance deals DMG, there is a high chance to apply Sensory Pursuit to the target enemy.

612622.name: Resonance Formation: Dance of Growth
612622.desc: Increase the Energy limit of Path Resonance from 100 to 200 points. Using abilities to resonate with a Path will consume all Energy. For every 5% Energy consumed that exceeds the original limit, attacks will deal DMG for 1 extra time.
612622.simple_desc: Doubles the Energy limit of Path Resonance. When using Path Resonance, consume all Energy to increase the number of damaging hits from the Resonance.

612623.name: Resonance Formation: Instant Win
612623.desc: When entering battle, Path Resonance regenerates 6% Energy. When a character launches a Follow-Up ATK, Path Resonance additionally regenerates 7% Energy.
612623.simple_desc: When entering battle, Path Resonances regenerates energy. When characters launch Follow-Up ATKs, Path Resonances regenerates energy.

612624.name: Resonance Interplay: The Taste of Anglerfish
612624.desc: When Path Resonance: Elation deals DMG, randomly dispels 1 debuff on 1 ally.
612624.simple_desc: When Path Resonance: Elation deals DMG, randomly dispels the debuffs on a character.

612625.name: Resonance Interplay: Guinea Pig in Ice Coffin
612625.desc: When Path Resonance: Elation deals Ice DMG, there is a 150% base chance to Freeze the enemy target for 1 turn(s).
612625.simple_desc: When Path Resonance: Elation deals Ice DMG, there is a high chance to Freeze the enemy.

612626.name: Resonance Interplay: Unending Night
612626.desc: When Path Resonance deals Fire/Wind/Physical/Lightning DMG, there is a 1% base chance to apply a DoT of the same Type, lasting for 2 turns.
612626.simple_desc: When the Path Resonance deals Fire, Wind, Physical or Lightning DMG, there is a chance inflict the DoT effect of the same type.

612627.name: Resonance Interplay: Pit and Pendulum
612627.desc: When using the Path Resonance, for every 1 Energy consumed, the ally with the highest ATK and all units summoned by allies will have their action Advanced Forward by 2%.
612627.simple_desc: Based on the amount of Energy used, Path Resonance advances the actions of the ally with the highest ATK and all units summoned by allies.

612630.name: Auto-Harmonica: Whitest Night
612630.desc: After a character launches a Follow-Up ATK, they deal "Aftertaste" DMG equal to 3% of their ATK for 1 to 2 time(s).
612630.simple_desc: After characters launch Follow-Up ATKs, deal "Aftertaste" DMG 1 — 2 time(s).

612631.name: Slaughterhouse No. 4: Rest in Peace
612631.desc: When characters launch Follow-Up ATKs to an enemy, deals "Aftertaste" DMG equal to 1% of their ATK to the enemy being hit. If the enemy also has their Weakness Broken, then deals DMG for 2 extra time(s).
612631.simple_desc: After characters launch Follow-Up ATKs, deals "Aftertaste" DMG 1 time. If the enemy currently has their Weakness Broken, then deal this DMG 2 extra time(s).

612632.name: Champion's Dinner: Cat's Cradle
612632.desc: When a character uses Ultimate to deal DMG to an enemy target, it is considered as Follow-Up ATK. Increases DMG dealt by Follow-Up ATKs by 1%.
612632.simple_desc: Characters' Ultimates are considered as Follow-Up ATK. The DMG dealt by Follow-Up ATK increases.

612640.name: Portrait of A Man On Fire
612640.desc: When causing Aftertaste DMG to an enemy, characters deal additional Aftertaste DMG of different Types for 1 time(s), at DMG values equal to 2% of the original DMG.
612640.simple_desc: Every time enemies receive Aftertaste DMG, they also receive extra Aftertaste DMG 1 time(s).

612641.name: Just Keep on Crying!
612641.desc: For every 1 Type of Aftertaste DMG the enemy received, increases the DMG taken by them by 1% until the end of their next action.
612641.simple_desc: The more DMG Types an enemy receives from Aftertaste, the more DMG they receive.

612642.name: The Hourglass Kindergarten
612642.desc: For every 1 Type of Aftertaste DMG the enemy received, reduces their ATK by 1% until the end of their next action.
612642.simple_desc: The more DMG Types an enemy receives from Aftertaste, the more their ATK is reduced.

612643.name: The Painted Albatross
612643.desc: For each enemy target hit by a character's Follow-Up ATK, the character deals Additional DMG equal to 1% of their ATK to all enemies hit.
612643.simple_desc: Deals Additional DMG based on the number of enemies hit by Follow-Up ATK.

612644.name: 12 Monkeys and Angry Men
612644.desc: When a character deals Follow-Up ATK DMG to an enemy target, the Follow-Up ATK DMG within this attack increases by 1%.
612644.simple_desc: The DMG dealt by characters within a single Follow-Up ATK increases gradually.

612645.name: Aiden Gravitational Rainbow
612645.desc: When a character launches Follow-Up ATKs on enemies, the enemies' action is delayed by 1%.
612645.simple_desc: After a character launches Follow-Up ATKs, the enemy's action is delayed.

612646.name: Twenty-First Military Rule
612646.desc: After a character launches Follow-Up ATKs, there is a 1% fixed chance to recover 1 Skill Point.
612646.simple_desc: After a character launches Follow-Up ATKs, there is a chance of recovering a Skill Point.

612650.name: Exemplary Conduct
612650.desc: For each Elation Blessing in possession, increases characters' Follow-Up ATK DMG dealt by 1%. This effect can stack up to 2 time(s).
612650.simple_desc: The more Blessings of Elation the team has, the higher the Follow-Up ATK DMG becomes.

612651.name: Mostly Harmful
612651.desc: The Weakness Break Efficiency increases by 1% when characters deal Follow-Up ATK DMG.
612651.simple_desc: Follow-Up ATKs' Weakness Break Efficiency increases.

612652.name: Suspiria
612652.desc: Increases characters' Follow-Up ATK DMG dealt by 1%.

612653.name: Pale Fire
612653.desc: Increases the CRIT Rate for Follow-Up ATK DMG dealt by characters by 1%.

612654.name: Back to the Lighthouse
612654.desc: When a character deals DMG to an enemy with a Follow-Up ATK, increases their Energy Regeneration Rate by 1%.
612654.simple_desc: When a character launches a Follow-Up ATK, their Energy Regeneration Rate increases.

612655.name: Doctor of Love
612655.desc: After a character launches a Follow-Up ATK, restores their HP by 1% of their Max HP.
612655.simple_desc: When a character launches Follow-Up ATK, they restore HP.

612656.name: Platinum Age
612656.desc: After characters launch Follow-Up ATKs, increase their DEF by 1% for 2 turn(s).
612656.simple_desc: When a character launches Follow-Up ATK, their DEF increases.

612657.name: Clockwork Apple
612657.desc: After characters launch Follow-Up ATKs, increases SPD by 1% for 2 turn(s).
612657.simple_desc: When a character launches Follow-Up ATK, their SPD increases.

612720.name: Path Resonance: Propagation
612720.desc: Consumes 100 Energy to resonate with the Path of Propagation and allows a target ally to immediately take action, recover 1 Skill Point(s) and become affected by Metamorphosis. Metamorphosis lasts for 1 turn and only takes effect on the latest target.
612720.simple_desc: After using a Path Resonance, a target ally immediately takes action, recovering 1 Skill Point(s) and activating Metamorphosis.

612721.name: Resonance Formation: Proboscis
612721.desc: Extends the duration of Metamorphosis for 1 turn. After a character with Metamorphosis defeats an enemy, Path Resonance regenerates 1% Energy.
612721.simple_desc: The duration of Metamorphosis is extended for 1 turn. After a character with Metamorphosis defeats an enemy, Path Resonance regenerates Energy.

612722.name: Resonance Formation: Phenol Compounds
612722.desc: Increase the Energy limit of Path Resonance from 100 to 200 points. After a character consumes or recovers Skill Points, additionally regenerates 1% Energy for Path Resonance.
612722.simple_desc: Path Resonance's Energy limit is doubled. After a character consumes or recovers Skill Points, Path Resonance regenerates energy.

612723.name: Resonance Formation: Crystal Pincers
612723.desc: Metamorphosis additionally increases DMG dealt by a character by 1%. Only when a character is under the Metamorphosis effect can they cause Spores to burst. Every time a character causes 1 Spore to burst, additionally deals Basic ATK DMG equal to 2% of the character's ATK. This effect can trigger up to 3 time(s) on the same target.
612723.simple_desc: Increases DMG dealt by characters with Metamorphosis. Only this type of character can cause Spores to burst, dealing additional DMG after bursting.

612724.name: Resonance Interplay: Superposition Eye
612724.desc: After using Path Resonance, nullifies all DMG received by a single target ally except DoT. This status is dispelled after being attacked. If the target ally's current HP percentage is lower than 1% when Path Resonance is used, it will additionally recover 2 Skill Point(s).
612724.simple_desc: After using a Path Resonance, make a target ally able to Block 1 attack. If that ally's HP percentage is lower than 1%, recover 2 Skill Point(s).

612725.name: Resonance Interplay: Adherent Microbial Mat
612725.desc: When using Path Resonance, a single target ally gains a Shield equal to 1% of Max HP, lasting for 2 turn(s).
612725.simple_desc: When using a Path Resonance, grants Shield to a target ally.

612726.name: Resonance Interplay: Compounded Macrospore
612726.desc: When using Path Resonance, heals the target ally for 1% of their Max HP. 2% of the healing that exceeds Max HP will be evenly distributed among other characters.
612726.simple_desc: When using Path Resonance, heals a target ally. Any exceeded Healing will be distributed to heal other allies.

612727.name: Resonance Interplay: Condensation Cavity
612727.desc: Characters in the Metamorphosis status deal 2% more DMG to Frozen enemies. In addition, their attacks have a 1% base chance to Freeze hit targets for 3 turns.
612727.simple_desc: Characters in the Metamorphosis state deal more DMG to Frozen enemies. In addition, their attacks have a low chance of Freezing the target.

612730.name: Spore Discharge
612730.desc: For each Skill Point a character consumes, all enemies will gain 1 Spore(s).
612730.simple_desc: When a character consumes Skill Points, causes all enemies to receive Spores.

612731.name: Fungal Pustule
612731.desc: For each Skill Point recovered, apply 1 Spore to 1 random enemy target(s).
612731.simple_desc: When a character recovers Skill Points, causes a random enemy to receive Spores.

612732.name: Scythe Limbs
612732.desc: After a character uses their Ultimate, the next time they consume Skill Points, it will be considered as 1 additional Skill Point being consumed. For each Skill Point consumed, the character's CRIT DMG increases by 1%. This effect can stack up to 2 time(s), lasting until the character uses an attack.
612732.simple_desc: After a character uses an Ultimate, when a Skill Point is consumed, it is considered as additionally consuming 1 Skill Point. The more Skill Points a character consumes, the higher their CRIT DMG.

612740.name: Putrefaction Ulcer
612740.desc: Changes the number of times Spores can spread after bursting to 1 times. Can also spread to the original bearer of Spores.
612740.simple_desc: The number of times Spores can spread after bursting increases. Can also spread to the original bearer.

612741.name: Lytic Enzyme
612741.desc: Increases the DMG caused by Spores bursting. The DMG increased is equal to 1% of the original DMG. After the target enemy was defeated, the Spores they were carrying will spread to targets adjacent to them.
612741.simple_desc: Increases DMG dealt by Spores. After an enemy is defeated, enemies adjacent to it will receive its Spores.

612742.name: Metabolic Cavity
612742.desc: For each Spore that bursts, heals the character with the lowest HP percentage by 1% of their Max HP.
612742.simple_desc: After Spores burst, restores the HP of the character with the lowest HP percentage.

612743.name: Excitatory Gland
612743.desc: If the team has 0 Skill Points when an ally uses their Basic ATK, additionally recovers 1 Skill Point.
612743.simple_desc: If the team has 0 Skill Points when an ally uses their Basic ATK, additionally recovers 1 Skill Point.

612744.name: Exposed Brain Matter
612744.desc: DMG dealt by characters' Basic ATK also deals DMG equal to 1% of the original DMG to a random adjacent target.
612744.simple_desc: Basic ATK DMG will Blast a random adjacent target.

612745.name: Intersegmental Membrane
612745.desc: For each Skill Point a character consumes, the DMG received by them decreases by 1% for 2 turn(s). This effect can be stacked up to 3 time(s).
612745.simple_desc: The more Skill Points a character consumes, the lower the DMG they receive.

612746.name: Catalyst
612746.desc: After a character uses their Skill and if the Skill did not unleash an attack, all allies' DMG dealt increases by 1% for 2 turn(s). This effect can be stacked up to 3 time(s).
612746.simple_desc: If, after a character uses their Skill, the Skill does not initiate an attack, increases the DMG of all allies.

612750.name: Osseus Blade
612750.desc: For each Blessing of Propagation in possession, increases all characters' Basic ATK DMG by 1%. This effect can stack up to 2 time(s).
612750.simple_desc: The more Blessings of Propagation the team has, the higher Basic ATK DMG becomes.

612751.name: Spinal Spur
612751.desc: The CRIT Rate for characters' Basic ATK DMG increases by 1%.
612751.simple_desc: Increases the CRIT Rate of Characters' Basic ATK.

612752.name: Channeled Needle
612752.desc: The CRIT DMG for characters' Basic ATK DMG increases by 1%.
612752.simple_desc: Increases the CRIT DMG of Characters' Basic ATK

612753.name: Conjunctiva
612753.desc: After characters use Basic ATKs, their DEF increases by 1% for 2 turn(s).
612753.simple_desc: When a character uses a Basic ATK, their DEF increases.

612754.name: Scaled Wing
612754.desc: After characters use Basic ATKs, their SPD increases by 1% for 2 turn(s).
612754.simple_desc: When a character launches a Basic ATK, their SPD increases.

612755.name: Compound Eye
612755.desc: After entering battle, recovers 1 Skill Point after each ally's turn. This effect can be triggered up to 1 time(s) across all allies.
612755.simple_desc: After entering battle, allies will recover Skill Points during the first 1 actions.

612756.name: Sporangium
612756.desc: For each Skill Point a character consumes, the character regenerates 1 extra Energy.
612756.simple_desc: Characters regenerate Energy when consuming Skill Points.

612757.name: Vesicle
612757.desc: For each Skill Point a character consumes, the character restores HP equal to 1% of their Max HP.
612757.simple_desc: Characters restore HP when consuming Skill Points

612820.name: Path Resonance: "Erudition"
612820.desc: Consume 100 Energy to resonate with the Path of Erudition. Path Resonance links the enemy with the highest Max HP with other enemies, inflicting Synapse Resonance on all enemies and dealing Imaginary DMG to them.
612820.simple_desc: Path Resonance inflicts Synapse Resonance on all enemies and deal Imaginary DMG to them.

612821.name: Resonance Formation: Melt Core
612821.desc: When an enemy target with Synapse Resonance is attacked by Ultimate, the enemy target with the highest Max HP takes increased DMG equal to 1% of the attacking character's ATK.
612821.simple_desc: When Synapse Resonance is triggered by an Ultimate, it will deal more DMG to the enemy with the highest Max HP.

612822.name: Resonance Formation: Chain Contagion
612822.desc: When characters defeat an enemy with Synapse Resonance, the effect is additionally triggered for 1 time(s).
612822.simple_desc: When characters defeat an enemy with Synapse Resonance, the effect is additionally triggered for 1 time(s).

612823.name: Resonance Formation: Memetic Inversion
612823.desc: When an enemy target appears, regenerates Path Resonance Energy equal to 1% of the combined Max Energy of all characters.
612823.simple_desc: Regenerates Path Resonance Energy upon encountering enemies.

612826.name: Resonance Interplay: Full Scan
612826.desc: When enemies with "Synapse Resonance" are attacked by Follow-Up ATKs, the effect is additionally triggered 1 time and the available "Synapse Resonance" count is not reduced.
612826.simple_desc: When enemy targets with "Synapse Resonance" are attacked by Follow-Up ATKs, the effect is additionally triggered once and its available count is not reduced.

612827.name: Resonance Interplay: Data Reinforcement
612827.desc: Attacks against Weakness Broken enemies do not reduce the available Synapse Resonance count.
612827.simple_desc: Attacks against Weakness Broken enemies do not reduce the available Synapse Resonance count.

612830.name: BCI-34 Gray Matter
612830.desc: When entering battle, charges the Brain in a Vat by 2%. Breaking an enemy's Weakness charges the Brain in a Vat by 1%.
612830.simple_desc: When entering battle, charges the Brain in a Vat. Breaking an enemy's Weakness charges the Brain in a Vat.

612831.name: SMR-2 Amygdala
612831.desc: Dealing fatal DMG to enemies will charge the Brain in a Vat by 1%.
612831.simple_desc: Dealing fatal DMG to enemies charges the Brain in a Vat.

612832.name: VEP-18 Occipital Lobe
612832.desc: The All-Type RES PEN for the Ultimate DMG dealt by characters increases by 1%. When an Ultimate is used, for every enemy target that is hit by this Ultimate, the All-Type RES PEN for the Ultimate DMG dealt will additionally increase by 2%. This effect lasts until the next time an Ultimate is used.
612832.simple_desc: Increases the All-Type RES PEN for characters' Ultimate DMG. The more enemy targets the Ultimate attacks, the greater the increase in the All-Type RES PEN for the Ultimate DMG, lasting until the next time the Ultimate is used.

612840.name: Attachment: Vestibular System
612840.desc: When characters use Ultimates via Brain in a Vat, their CRIT DMG increases by 1%, lasting until this ability ends.
612840.simple_desc: Ultimate cast with the Brain in a Vat deals more CRIT DMG.

612841.name: Imitation: Transmitter Synthesis
612841.desc: For every 1 Energy that exceeds the characters' Max Energy, charges Brain in a Vat by 1%.
612841.simple_desc: When the character's Energy exceeds the limit, the exceeded Energy charges the Brain in a Vat.

612842.name: Implant: Explicit Memory
612842.desc: After characters use their Ultimate via Brain in a Vat, they gain a Shield equal in strength to 1% of their Max HP, lasting for 2 turns.
612842.simple_desc: Gains Shield when using an Ultimate via the Brain in a Vat.

612843.name: Mimesis: Tactile Pathway
612843.desc: After characters use an attack, they deal Additional DMG to the attacked enemy target(s). For every enemy target that was attacked, increase Additional DMG by 1% of the character's ATK.
612843.simple_desc: After characters use an attack, deal additional DMG based on the number of enemies attacked.

612844.name: Analysis: Subliminal Sensation
612844.desc: Ultimate DMG dealt by characters increases by 1%, lasting until the end of the first Ultimate they use in battle. After entering battle, characters regenerate energy equal to 2% of their respective Max Energy.
612844.simple_desc: Increases the first instance of Ultimate DMG dealt by the character. Regenerates Energy upon entering battle.

612845.name: Load: Striated Cortex
612845.desc: If characters' AoE ATK ability only attacks 1 enemy, this ATK will deal an additional set amount of DMG equal to 1% of the original DMG to the attacked enemy target.
612845.simple_desc: If characters' AoE ability only attacks one enemy, the ability deals a set amount of extra DMG based on the original ability DMG.

612846.name: Stimulation: Saltatory Conduction
612846.desc: When characters use their Ultimate to attack enemies that are Weakness Broken, delay the enemy's action by 1%. Every time the enemy target becomes Weakness Broken, this effect can be triggered up to 2 times.
612846.simple_desc: Ultimate attacks delay all Weakness Broken enemies' actions.

612850.name: Throne of Engaged Gears
612850.desc: For every Blessing of Erudition currently in possession, Ultimate DMG dealt by characters increases by 1%, stacking up to 2 times.
612850.simple_desc: The more Blessings of Erudition the team has, the higher the Ultimate DMG dealt by characters becomes.

612851.name: Ring of Bent Wires
612851.desc: The CRIT Rate for Ultimate DMG dealt by characters increases by 1%.

612852.name: Scepter of Energy Torque
612852.desc: The CRIT DMG for Ultimate DMG dealt by characters increases by 1%.

612853.name: Torch of Anti-Lag Ignition
612853.desc: After characters use their Ultimate, their next attack will deal 1% more DMG.
612853.simple_desc: Increases the DMG of the characters' next attack following their Ultimate.

612854.name: Candle of Delayed Diffraction
612854.desc: After characters use an AoE ATK ability, their ATK increases by 1%, lasting for 2 turn(s).
612854.simple_desc: Characters' ATK increases after using an AoE ATK ability.

612855.name: Canopy of Mottled Metal
612855.desc: After characters use an AoE ATK ability, their DEF increases by 1%, lasting for 2 turn(s).
612855.simple_desc: Characters' DEF increases after using an AoE ATK ability.

612856.name: Garment of Coiled Wires
612856.desc: After characters use their Ultimate, they restore HP equal to 1% of their Max HP.
612856.simple_desc: Characters restore HP after using their Ultimate.

612857.name: Wreath of Interlaced Pipes
612857.desc: When struck with a killing blow, characters will not be knocked down and will instead consume all their Energy, then restore HP equal to 1% of the consumed Energy. This effect can only be triggered once per battle for the whole team.
612857.simple_desc: Characters can resist fatal DMG and can consume Energy to restore their own HP. This can take effect a limited number of times among all allies.
